questions.question: Explain the main difference between Prim's Algorithm and Kruskal's Algorithm in terms of their approach to finding the Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) of a graph. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the choice of edges to include in the MST

questions.question: Design a simple Huffman coding scheme for the English alphabet. Provide the Huffman tree and the resulting Huffman codes for each letter. Explain the time complexity of your scheme.
Compare and contrast Dijkstra's Algorithm with Prim's Algorithm in terms of their suitability for finding the shortest path in a weighted graph. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the choice of starting node and edge selection
